preview.bannerTitle: You're seeing a Pro athlete's sample data
preview.bannerBody: Upgrade to Pro to use these features with your own sessions.
preview.emptyBody: Upload your first race to see your own metrics — or preview the dashboard with a Pro athlete's sample data.

coaches.title: Coaches
coaches.empty: No coaches on this team yet.

teammates.title: Teammates
teammates.empty: No other teammates on this team yet.

manage.removeConfirmBody: {name} will lose access to this team's data. This can be reversed by re-approving them later.
manage.toastRemoveError: Could not remove — please try again.
manage.toastGenderError: Could not update gender — please try again.

leave.confirmAthleteBody: You'll lose access to team data and any pending analyses tied to this team. You can rejoin later by re-entering the team code.
leave.confirmCoachBody: You'll lose coach access to this team's data and roster. You can rejoin by re-entering the team code, but pending approvals you handled stay attached to the team.
leave.confirmCancelBody: Your pending request to {team} will be removed. You can request again later.
leave.toastError: Could not leave team — please try again.
leave.blockedLastCoach: You're the only active coach on this team. Add another coach or remove all athletes before leaving.

athleteEmpty.title: Join your team
athleteEmpty.body: Once your coach shares a team code, enter it here. They'll approve your request before you see team data.

athletePending.title: Waiting for your coach to approve
athletePending.body: Your coach has been notified. Once they approve, your team data and roster will appear here.

athleteActive.title: You're on the roster
athleteActive.body: Full team info — coaches list, leaving the team, and squad mates — lands here in the next update.

pending.bannerBodyOne: 1 member is waiting to join your team. Click to review.
pending.bannerBodyN: {n} members are waiting to join your team. Click to review.
pending.confirmApproveBody: {name} will be added to your team and gain access to its data.
pending.confirmRejectBody: {name} will be removed from your team's pending list. They can request again later.
pending.toastError: Could not update — please try again.

board.title: LEADERBOARDS
board.heading: Top performers
board.noTeamHint: Join a team to see team rankings.
board.cardFastestStartSub: best 15 m time off the block

compOptin.toggleOffSub: Add yourself to the global rankings. You'll appear on every event leaderboard.
compOptin.toggleOnSub: You're competing on every event. Toggle off any time to leave.
compOptin.toastOptedIn: You're now competing on the leaderboard.
compOptin.toastError: Could not update — please try again.
compOptin.proStripBody: Upgrade to Pro to add yourself to the rankings.

modal.title: Update status
modal.sub: Update the request status. Athletes are emailed automatically when marked complete.
modal.notesHint: Visible to the athlete on completion.
modal.errFallback: Could not update status. Try again.

signinCard.title: Performance Lab
signinCard.sub: Sign in to your Peak Athlete account.

signupCard.title: Create your account
signupCard.sub: Set up Performance Lab in under a minute. We'll send a verification link after you finish.
signupCard.errNoUser: Sign-up returned no user. Try again or contact eric@mypeakathlete.com.

verifyCard.title: Check your email
verifyCard.subA: We sent a verification link to
verifyCard.subB: . Click it to activate your account, then come back here to sign in.
verifyCard.errFallback: Could not resend the email. Try again in a minute.
verifyCard.info: Verification email re-sent. Check your inbox.

forgotCard.title: Forgot password?
forgotCard.sub: Enter the email you signed up with. We'll send you a link to set a new password.
forgotCard.errFallback: Could not send reset link. Try again in a minute.
forgotCard.sentSubB: , we sent a password-reset link. Click it to set a new password, then come back here to sign in.

resetCard.title: Set a new password
resetCard.sub: Pick a password you haven't used here before. You'll be signed in immediately after.
resetCard.errFallback: Could not update password. Try requesting a new reset link.

consentModal.title: Terms & Privacy
consentModal.sub: Before you start using Performance Lab, please review and accept how we handle your data. This only takes a second.
consentModal.tosBody: Performance Lab is for viewing and analyzing your own (or your athletes') swim performance. Intended for users 13+ — under 13 requires verified parental consent. Don't misuse the service or upload content you don't own. iOS subscriptions are managed through Apple; Android through Google Play.
consentModal.privBody: We store your performance metrics, video files, and account details in encrypted storage. We never sell your data. You can access, export, or delete your account anytime by emailing eric@mypeakathlete.com — we respond within 30 days.
consentModal.agreeLabel: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
consentModal.errFallback: Could not record acceptance. Try again.

preferences.title: PREFERENCES
preferences.themeSubDark: Currently dark. Toggle from the topbar or here.
preferences.themeSubLight: Currently light. Toggle from the topbar or here.
preferences.languageSub: Switch the dashboard between English and Spanish.
preferences.accentSub: Currently teal. Custom accents coming post-launch.

subscription.trialEndsOn: Your trial ends on {date}. We'll move you to the paid Pro plan automatically.
subscription.cancelsAtEnd: Your Pro access stays active until {date}, then drops to Free. You can reactivate anytime from the customer portal.
subscription.freePlanLine: You're on the Free plan. 1 race analysis per month. Upgrade to Pro for 3 analyses, video downloads, the Pulse AI coach, and competition leaderboards.
subscription.billingByStripe: Billing is handled by Stripe. Manage Billing opens Stripe's hosted portal in a new tab.
subscription.nativeManageDisclaimer: Manage Subscription opens Google Play's subscription page. Cancellations and refunds are handled there.

profile.title: YOUR PROFILE
profile.name: Name
profile.editingHint: Profile editing is coming in a future update. To change your name or email meanwhile, contact eric@mypeakathlete.com.

notifications.title: NOTIFICATIONS
notifications.body: Email preferences for analysis updates, coach notes, and team activity will live here. For now, transactional emails (your analysis is ready, your race request was received) fire automatically and can't be unsubscribed without contacting eric@mypeakathlete.com.

trialLock.title: More history is locked
trialLock.body: Free accounts can open the 2 most recent sessions. Upgrade to Pro for full history access.

compareLock.toastBody: Upgrade to Pro to compare two sessions side-by-side.

video.noVideo: No video for this trial yet.
video.proBody: Upgrade to Pro to play the video alongside your splits and stroke mechanics. Your videos are stored forever once analyzed.

errorState.racesMessage: We hit an error pulling your race history. Try again, or refresh the page if it keeps failing.
errorState.startsMessage: We hit an error pulling your start trials. Try again, or refresh the page if it keeps failing.
errorState.turnsMessage: We hit an error pulling your turn trials. Try again, or refresh the page if it keeps failing.

emptyState.racesBody: Once a race is processed, your splits, stroke rate, and stroke count will appear here.
emptyState.startsBody: Once a start is processed, reaction time, flight phase, and underwater velocity will appear here.
emptyState.turnsBody: Once a turn is processed, approach time, rotation, push-off, and breakout will appear here.

notify.tooltipSend: Email the athlete that their analysis is ready
notify.confirmSend: Email the athlete that their analysis is ready?
notify.confirmResend: Email the athlete again? They've already been notified.

pulse.title: Pulse AI
pulse.welcome: Pick a prompt below to ask Pulse about your data.
pulse.disclaimer: AI-generated insights based on your data. Always verify with your coach.

proBanner.headline: Get 3 race analyses every month
proBanner.subline: Plus Pulse AI coach · Video downloads · Full dashboard

requests.title: Your requests
requests.empty: No requests yet. The button up top starts your first one.
requests.checkRaces: Check the Races tab for results.
requests.fileHint: MP4 or MOV · up to 500 MB

nextFocus.needMore: Run a few more trials to see your next focus.
nextFocus.needTwoSame: Need at least 2 races at the same event in this stroke.

coach.noTeamLine: Your coach profile isn't linked to a team yet.
coach.rosterEmptyHero: No athletes on your team yet — the roster fills in once they're linked.
coach.noSessions7d: No sessions logged across the squad in the last 7 days. Worth a check-in.
coach.allActiveLine: All {n} athletes logged a session this week — {s} {trialWord} captured across the squad.
coach.someActiveLine: {a} of {n} athletes logged a session this week — {s} {trialWord} captured across the squad.
coach.noTeamTitle: Get on a team to unlock the squad view
coach.noTeamBody: Once you join an existing team or create a new one, your athletes' analysis and recent activity will appear here. You can switch teams later.
coach.emptyRosterBody: No athletes on your team yet.

squadFocus.notEnoughTrials: Not enough trials across the squad yet.
squadFocus.noSignalInStroke: No squad signal in this stroke yet.

sessions.emptyBody: Your next Peak Athlete video session will appear here. Or hit "+ New session" to start one yourself.
sessions.cardDeleteConfirm: Delete "{title}" and all of its clips? This cannot be undone.
sessions.detailDeleteConfirm:
Delete this session and its {n} {clipWord}?

All notes, annotations, and tags on those clips will also be removed. This cannot be undone.
sessions.detailDeleteConfirmEmpty: Delete this empty session? This cannot be undone.
sessions.shareTooltipOn: Currently shared with team. Click to remove.
sessions.shareTooltipOff: Share this session with the team library.
sessions.shareCardTooltipOn: Shared with team — click to remove
sessions.deleteClipConfirm: Delete this clip and its notes / annotations / tags? This cannot be undone.
sessions.pickClipPrompt: Pick a clip on the left to start.
sessions.emptyClips: No clips in this session yet
sessions.emptyClipsBody: Clips will appear here once uploaded.
sessions.notePlaceholder: What did you see at this moment?
sessions.emptyNotesPrompt: Pause at any moment and tap
sessions.deleteTagConfirm: Delete tag "{name}" from your library? It will be removed from every clip it was applied to.
sessions.tagsProGate: Pro feature — tag clips and find them in Library
sessions.noSessionsMatchBodyTag: No sessions contain a clip with every selected tag. Remove a filter or pick another tag.
sessions.noSessionsMatchBody: No sessions visible yet — your filmed and promoted sessions land here.
sessions.noTagsYet: No tags yet — tag a clip from its workspace to start filtering here.
sessions.pickerAddTooltip: Add this trial to one of your sessions
sessions.pickerInSessionTooltip: Already in a session — click to open in Sessions tab
sessions.pickerNoSessions: No existing sessions for this athlete.
